extortion.description: PDQ Airspares is a leading global provider of aerospace consumables to the Airline and MRO markets. Our reputation for delivering a range of solutions for your operational requirements is unparalleled in the industry. Whatever your requirements may be, you can rely on us to deliver the products you need when you need them.SITE: www.pdq-airspares.co.uk Address : The Office, Redbrook, Fordingbridge Hampshire, SP6 2ET, UKALL DATA SIZE: ~500gb+ 1. Corporate data 2. Personal users documents & etc…
